title: Dead Toll Rises To 14 In Boiler Blast At Vedanta Power Plant In Chhattisgarh, President Murmu Expresses Grief
description: The boiler explosion at Vedanta's power plant in Sakti district has resulted in 14 confirmed deaths and numerous injuries. The blast, which occurred around 2 PM, was linked to a tube rupture in the boiler. Emergency services responded swiftly, transferring injured workers to hospitals.
